scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); for (const file of ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock']) { try { fs.rmSync(file); } catch {} } if (!String(process.env.npm_config_user_agent || '').startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test:audit-remediation: corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:param-validators && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:mysticism-auth && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:trust-proxy-wiring && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:security-headers && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:message-order && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:csrf && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:readings-params && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:readings-patch-notes && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:share-cap && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:logger-redact && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:public-config && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/mysticism-web run test:escape-html && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/mysticism-web run test:markdown && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/mysticism-web run test:result-actions
